title: Senior RPA Automation Engineer
description:
Senior RPA Automation Engineer with 7+ years of IT experience, including 3.5+ years working on the banking project. Responsible for developing, enhancing, and supporting automation solutions using Automation Anywhere, VBA, and Python while ensuring banking compliance, accuracy, and stability.

Key Responsibilities

· Develop, enhance, and support RPA and automation solutions for Bank.

· Design and maintain VBA automation frameworks for Excel-based business processes.

· Automate Excel–Outlook workflows including mail extraction and automated responses.

· Develop automation scripts using Python where required.

· Analyze business requirements and translate them into automation workflows.

· Implement exception handling, logging, and recovery mechanisms.

· Support UAT, production deployments, incident resolution, and root cause analysis.

· Collaborate with global stakeholders for requirement clarification and status updates.

·  Ensure compliance with banking standards and SDLC processes.

·  Maintain technical and process documentation.

postedCompany.description:
PureSoftware is a software product and services company that  focuses on driving a differentiated customer experience, accelerating cycle time and improving business outcomes through an integration of digital solutions, robotic automation and non-linear commercial models. PureSoftware provides value driven services and solutions to its customers by leveraging its offerings in Digital, Product Engineering and Application Development and Management. 

Our flagship product ‘arttha’  (www.arttha.com) is one of the fastest growing enterprise fintech platforms. It helps businesses embrace digital solutions in the areas of financial services, mobile banking, agency/ branchless banking, microfinance, insurance, payments, and payments aggregation. Arttha has been adopted by more than 50 banks & financial institutions, and four mobile operators, in the last three years.

Through our customer centric and collaborative approach, we have been able to create engagement models that delivers cost and time reduction in projects while maintaining the highest software engineering quality and standards. We provide our clients with a unique multi-point engagement model, which enables faster and more meaningful communications between various functional teams involved in the project. Our innovation driven development approach and thought leadership in various domains gives us an edge over our competition.
postedCompany.name: PURESOFTWARE PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
